project_type: Next.js 16 App Router music discovery web app
test_framework: No test framework configured - no test scripts or test files exist
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm run lint to verify no ESLint errors. 2. Run npm run build to confirm the project builds successfully with zero errors.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js available. No test runner configured. AGENTS.md warns that Next.js 16 may have breaking changes from training data - check node_modules/next/dist/docs/ but that dir doesn't exist in this install.
contribution_requirements: Must pass ESLint and build with zero errors. Must use responsive Tailwind CSS. Must follow App Router best practices (Server Components by default, Client Components only when needed). Must include loading/empty/error states. Must be accessible with semantic HTML.
key_patterns: - Uses Geist font (already configured in layout.tsx). - CSS variables for theming with dark mode via html.dark class. - @theme inline block in globals.css for Tailwind v4 custom colors. - Components in app/components/ (mix of server and client components). - API layer in lib/itunes.ts and lib/lastfm.ts using fetch with revalidate caching. - Context providers: AudioPlayerContext, FavoritesContext, PersonalizationContext, ThemeContext. - ArtistCard currently links to external iTunes URL (artist.artistLinkUrl) - must change to in-app /artist/[id] route. - AlbumCard links to external iTunes URL - should link to in-app /album/[id] route. - SimilarArtists links to external Last.fm URLs. - MiniPlayer fixed at bottom with glassmorphism. - Uses next/image with remotePatterns for mzstatic.com and lastfm.freetls.fastly.net.
directory_structure: Root: next.config.ts, package.json, tsconfig.json, eslint.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs. app/ contains pages (page.tsx, layout.tsx), route groups (artist/[id], album/[id], track/[id], discover, dashboard, favorites, playlists), and components/ directory. lib/ contains API utilities (itunes.ts, lastfm.ts, types.ts, api-error.ts, favorites.ts, recommendations.ts, discovery.ts, personalization.ts, recent-searches.ts). types/ contains speech-recognition.d.ts. public/ for static assets.
